engine.working_binary: pw.x/ph.x from conda-forge qe=7.5 inside WSL UbuntuQE
failed_attempts: Windows-native MSYS2 Quantum ESPRESSO crashed even on H2
Ubuntu apt quantum-espresso 6.7 crashed on H2/example inputs

common_settings.pseudopotentials: PSLibrary RRKJUS UPF files under pseudos/

candidates.name: candidate_01_NbNSe
candidates.stability_conclusion: rejected: large imaginary Gamma phonon modes
candidates.her_conclusion: weak H adsorption after consistent clean-surface relaxation

candidates.name: candidate_NbS2
candidates.stability_conclusion: passes Gamma phonon check in this lightweight setup
candidates.her_conclusion: stable but HER is not close enough to 0 eV

candidates.name: candidate_NbSSe
candidates.stability_conclusion: borderline: only small Gamma imaginary acoustic-like modes at this convergence level
candidates.her_conclusion: best checked HER among the tested structures is S_top, but still positive

overall_conclusion: The ML surrogate successfully generated plausible 2D candidates and the QE workflow runs end-to-end. The first DFT checks show a gap between surrogate HER scores and PBE/QE adsorption energies; NbS2 is dynamically stable but HER is weak, NbNSe is dynamically unstable, and NbSSe is borderline stable with better but still positive HER. More data and active-learning retraining with DFT labels are recommended.
